title: Restore Customer and Driver trip history UI

requirements.summary: Restore the 'My Trips' section in the Customer Dashboard showing trips where trip.customerPrincipal == caller, with immediate refresh after booking
acceptanceCriteria: Customer Dashboard displays a 'My Trips' section
Only trips where customerPrincipal matches the caller are shown
Each trip shows status, pickup/dropoff locations, vehicle type, fare, and timestamps
After booking a trip, it appears in My Trips immediately without a hard refresh
Status badge reflects current trip status (pending/assigned/confirmed/completed/cancelled)

file_operations.description: Uncomment or restore the CustomerTripList component import and JSX usage. Ensure the 'My Trips' section is visible below the RideRequestForm. The component already filters trips where customerPrincipal matches the caller via useGetMyTrips hook.

Verify that the component correctly displays all trip fields: status badge, pickup/dropoff locations (using Location.area and Location.pincode), vehicle type, fare (totalFare), and timestamps (createdTime, startDateTime, endDateTime). Ensure status badges map to pending/assigned/confirmed/completed/cancelled and use appropriate styling. The component already fetches trips via useGetMyTrips.

Ensure the useCreateTrip mutation includes an onSuccess callback that invalidates the 'myTrips' query key, triggering an immediate refetch of the customer's trip list without requiring a hard refresh. Verify that useGetMyTrips uses the correct query key and enabled flag.

requirements.summary: Restore the 'My Trips' tab in the Driver Dashboard alongside 'Available Trips', showing trips where trip.driverPrincipal == caller and removing placeholder text
acceptanceCriteria: Driver Dashboard shows two tabs: 'Available Trips' and 'My Trips'
'My Trips' tab displays trips where driverPrincipal matches the caller
'Available Trips' tab displays only trips with no driver assigned
No 'coming soon' placeholder text is visible in the Driver Dashboard
Both tabs render trip details (locations, status, fare, timestamps)

file_operations.description: Restore the 'My Trips' tab alongside the existing 'Available Trips' tab. Remove any 'coming soon' placeholder text. Ensure both tabs are visible and functional. The 'Available Trips' tab should render AvailableTripsSection (trips with no driver assigned). The 'My Trips' tab should render DriverTripList (trips where driverPrincipal matches caller). Use a tabbed UI pattern (e.g., shadcn/ui Tabs component or custom tab buttons) to switch between the two views.

Verify that the component correctly filters and displays trips where driverPrincipal matches the caller. Ensure all trip details are rendered: pickup/dropoff locations (using Location.area and Location.pincode), status badge, vehicle type, fare (totalFare), and timestamps (createdTime, startDateTime, endDateTime). Confirm the 'Complete Trip' button appears only for trips with status 'accepted'. The component already uses useGetMyTrips and useCompleteTrip hooks.

Verify that the component correctly fetches and displays only trips with no driver assigned (status 'requested'). Ensure trip details (pickup/dropoff locations, vehicle type, fare) are visible and the 'Accept Trip' button triggers the useAcceptTrip mutation. Confirm that accepting a trip invalidates relevant queries to update both 'Available Trips' and 'My Trips' views immediately.

Ensure useAcceptTrip and useCompleteTrip mutations include onSuccess callbacks that invalidate both 'availableTrips' and 'myTrips' query keys, triggering immediate refetch of driver trip lists without hard refresh. Verify that useGetMyTrips correctly filters trips by caller's principal and that useGetAvailableTrips (or equivalent) fetches only unassigned trips.
